title: parent_phase.placeholder
description: Placeholder for the per-parent heterozygous-site phase map. HPP HANDOFF.md flags this as the single biggest open question for the Stage 3 schema: where does parent-heterozygous-site phase live in the Stage 3 output? Until that is locked, HPP consumes this sidecar TSV. Rows are only required for sites where the parent is heterozygous; hom sites need no entry. Swap target when Stage 3 ships.

parental_hap.description: Which of the parent's two haplotypes carries the ALT allele.
